    About Us

    Ottawa's Trusted
    Auto Shop Since 1996

    Dave Stoddard and Mark Powell have been keeping Ottawa drivers safe on the road for over 30 years. What started as a neighbourhood garage in Nepean has grown into one of the most trusted auto service shops in the Ottawa West area.

    We're not a dealership. We're your neighbours — we treat every vehicle like it's our own, give you straight answers, and never recommend a repair you don't need. That's why our customers keep coming back, and keep sending their friends and family.

    Honest Diagnostics

    We tell you exactly what's wrong and what it'll cost — no surprises.

    30+ Years Experience

    Thousands of Ottawa vehicles serviced since 1996.

    4.8★ Rated

    116 Google reviews from real Ottawa customers.

    All Makes & Models

    From compact cars to full-size trucks — we work on them all.

    Book an Appointment →
    What We Do

    Complete Auto Service
    Under One Roof

    From routine maintenance to complex repairs — experienced technicians, honest pricing.

    ❄️

    A/C Service & Repair

    Full air conditioning installation, diagnosis and repair to keep you comfortable year-round.

    💰 From ~$149
    🔧

    Engine Repair

    Comprehensive engine diagnostics and repair — from minor tune-ups to major overhauls.

    💰 Quote on inspection
    🛑

    Brake Service

    Complete brake inspection, pad replacement, rotor resurfacing and hydraulic repair.

    💰 From ~$129
    🔋

    Battery Service

    Battery testing, replacement and charging system diagnosis for all makes and models.

    💰 From ~$89
    🛢️

    Oil Changes

    Conventional, synthetic and blended oil changes with multi-point vehicle inspection.

    💰 From ~$59
    ⚡

    Electrical Repair

    Full electrical diagnostics, wiring, starters, alternators and more.

    💰 Quote on inspection
    🌀

    Steering & Suspension

    Alignment, struts, shocks, tie rods and complete suspension system repairs.

    💰 From ~$149
    🔩

    Exhaust System

    Muffler, catalytic converter, exhaust pipe repair and full system replacement.

    💰 From ~$99
    🚗

    Tires & Filters

    Tire installation, balancing, rotation, and air/cabin filter replacement.

    💰 From ~$25/tire
    Rust Protection

    Nepean Kanata
    Rustcheck Dealer

    Protect your vehicle from Ottawa's harsh winters and road salt. Rustcheck treatments provide long-lasting protection that saves you thousands.

    ✓

    Annual Rust Treatment

    Penetrating oil-based formula reaches all hidden cavities to stop rust before it starts.

    ✓

    New & Used Vehicles

    Works on any make, model or age — protect your investment from day one.

    ✓

    Authorized Dealer

    Official Rustcheck dealer for Nepean and Kanata — certified and guaranteed.

    Shield Your Vehicle

    Ottawa's road salt and freeze-thaw cycles are brutal on vehicles. A single Rustcheck treatment significantly extends your vehicle's life.
